# TROCCO Docs

TROCCOのユーザー向けドキュメント一覧です。

## チュートリアル

- [クイックスタート【ワークフロー編】](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trocco-io/trocco-docs-md/refs/heads/main/trocco/trocco-quick-start-workflow.md)
- [クイックスタート【転送設定編】](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trocco-io/trocco-docs-md/refs/heads/main/trocco/trocco-quick-start.md)
- [転送設定に関する便利な設定を行う](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trocco-io/trocco-docs-md/refs/heads/main/trocco/trocco-tutorial-additional-settings.md)
- [接続情報を作成する](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trocco-io/trocco-docs-md/refs/heads/main/trocco/trocco-tutorial-connection-configurations.md)
- [データを加工する](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trocco-io/trocco-docs-md/refs/heads/main/trocco/trocco-tutorial-datamart-definitions.md)
- [データを転送する](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trocco-io/trocco-docs-md/refs/heads/main/trocco/trocco-tutorial-etl-configurations.md)
- [ワークフローを組む](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trocco-io/trocco-docs-md/refs/heads/main/trocco/trocco-tutorial-workflow-definitions.md)
- [TROCCOへようこそ](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trocco-io/trocco-docs-md/refs/heads/main/trocco/trocco-tutorial.md)

### マネージド転送設定
